deck.name: Modern Slang & Gen Z English
deck.description: Stay up to date with the latest informal expressions, social media terms, and Gen Z slang.

cards.definition: secretly, or to a small extent
cards.context: I lowkey want to stay home tonight instead of going out.

cards.definition: openly, clearly, or to a large extent (opposite of lowkey)
cards.context: I highkey love this new song, it's been on repeat all day.

cards.definition: I'm not lying; for real; seriously
cards.context: That was the best burger I've ever had, no cap.

cards.definition: an agreement or confirmation; 'okay' or 'challenge accepted'
cards.context: A: 'Want to go to the movies?' B: 'Bet, let's go!'

cards.definition: to do something exceptionally well; to look great
cards.context: You absolutely slayed that presentation today.

cards.definition: gossip or interesting news
cards.context: What happened at the party? Spill the tea!

cards.definition: when you can't stop thinking about something (usually negative)
cards.context: That embarrassing thing I said three years ago lives in my head rent free.

cards.definition: someone who carries themselves with confidence and treats their life like a movie
cards.context: Walking through the city with headphones on gives me major main character energy.

cards.definition: short for 'suspicious'; something that seems dishonest or strange
cards.context: He's being very quiet today, it's kind of sus.

cards.definition: the atmosphere of a place or the mood of a person; relaxing
cards.context: I'm just vibing to some lo-fi music while I study.

cards.definition: suddenly stopping all communication with someone without explanation
cards.context: We went on two dates and then he just ghosted me.

cards.definition: to be caught doing something wrong with clear evidence
cards.context: He tried to deny it, but they caught him in 4K on the security camera.

cards.definition: influence or power, especially on social media
cards.context: He's only doing that stunt for the clout.

cards.definition: to show off your achievements or possessions
cards.context: Buying that expensive watch was a weird flex, but okay.

cards.definition: it reminds me of... / it has the atmosphere of...
cards.context: Your outfit? It's giving 90s retro vibes.

cards.definition: to do exactly what was needed or to over-deliver on expectations
cards.context: The actress in that role really understood the assignment.

cards.definition: extremely good, usually referring to food
cards.context: This pasta is straight up bussin'.

cards.definition: an extremely devoted fan (can be a noun or a verb)
cards.context: I totally stan this artist, I've seen them in concert five times.

cards.definition: used at the end of a sentence to emphasize that there is no more to say
cards.context: She is the best singer of our generation, periodt.

cards.definition: someone who looks very attractive
cards.context: Did you see his new photo? He's looking like a whole snack.

cards.definition: something you admire and want for yourself
cards.context: Their relationship is total goals.

cards.definition: something you relate to or how you feel right now
cards.context: A picture of a sleeping cat? Honestly, mood.

cards.definition: being upset, angry, or bitter over something minor
cards.context: He's still salty because he lost the game.

cards.definition: over the top, dramatic, or excessive
cards.context: She brought three suitcases for a weekend trip; she's so extra.

cards.definition: extremely surprised, shocked, or impressed
cards.context: I was absolutely shook by the ending of that movie.

cards.definition: reasonable, acceptable, or understandable
cards.context: Feeling tired after a 10-hour flight is completely valid.

cards.definition: If You Know, You Know — referring to an inside joke or niche information
cards.context: That coffee shop in the alley is the best in town. #iykyk

cards.definition: a way to tell someone they need to get off the internet and back to reality
cards.context: You've been arguing on Twitter for five hours. Go touch grass.

cards.definition: when a reply to a post gets way more likes than the original post (indicating disagreement)
cards.context: His controversial tweet got absolutely ratioed within minutes.

cards.definition: short for 'Win' (good) or 'Loss' (bad)
cards.context: That new update is a total W for the users.

cards.definition: someone who is independent, successful, and doesn't follow social norms (often used ironically)
cards.context: He's got that sigma grindset, working 15 hours a day.

cards.definition: the attempt to maximize one's physical attractiveness through various methods
cards.context: He's been looksmaxxing lately, new haircut and better skincare.

cards.definition: a technique involving tongue posture intended to improve jawline definition
cards.context: Why are you being so quiet? Oh, you're mewing?

cards.definition: short for 'charisma'; the ability to attract or flirt with someone
cards.context: He's got so much rizz, he can talk to anyone.

cards.definition: an exclamation used when seeing someone with a large behind (slang)
cards.context: Gyatt! Did you see that person over there?

cards.definition: a nonsense word made famous by 'Skibidi Toilet', often used to mean 'bad' or just as a filler
cards.context: That's so skibidi, I don't even know what you're saying.

cards.definition: stealing a portion of someone's food (named after streamer Fanum)
cards.context: Give me a fry! Fanum tax!

cards.definition: short for 'delusional'; usually regarding a crush or a situation
cards.context: I think he likes me back. Am I being delulu?

cards.definition: opposition or enemies (originally from gang culture, now used for any rivals)
cards.context: I'm staying away from the drama, don't want no trouble with the opps.

cards.definition: annoyed, upset, or bothered by something someone said
cards.context: Why are you so pressed? It was just a joke.

cards.definition: short for 'fixing to'; about to do something
cards.context: I'm finna go to the gym, want to come?

cards.definition: used when something is extremely funny
cards.context: That video was hilarious, I'm dead! 💀

cards.definition: mediocre or average; not as good as the hype suggests
cards.context: Honestly, that movie was mid.

cards.definition: Greatest Of All Time; being the absolute best at something
cards.context: LeBron is goated in the basketball world.

cards.definition: reasonable or acceptable (already present, adding context)
cards.context: Your point is completely valid.
